allow: PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $size = 128; $cell = 16; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($size, $size\); $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $c1 = [System.Drawing.Color]::FromArgb\(230, 230, 230\); $c2 = [System.Drawing.Color]::FromArgb\(80, 80, 80\); for \($y = 0; $y -lt $size; $y += $cell\) { for \($x = 0; $x -lt $size; $x += $cell\) { $useC1 = \(\(\($x / $cell\) + \($y / $cell\)\) % 2\) -eq 0; $col = if \($useC1\) { $c1 } else { $c2 }; $brush = New-Object System.Drawing.SolidBrush\($col\); $g.FillRectangle\($brush, $x, $y, $cell, $cell\); $brush.Dispose\(\) } }; $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Save\("Assets/Resources/Textures/Checker.png", [System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat]::Png\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); Get-Item "Assets/Resources/Textures/Checker.png" | Select-Object Length)
